spec_match.rationale: The test logic correctly handles exact matching (Chrome 150) versus case-insensitive mapping (pre-150 quirks) and missing anchors by mapping sets and lowercase keys.

interactive.rationale: Users can edit the lists of anchors and test fragment URLs directly in the textarea fields and click 'Test fragments' to generate a custom comparison matrix.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the Chrome 150 case-sensitivity spec alignment between quirks and standards modes perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully filters out blank lines, case overlaps, and missing anchors, highlighting exactly how Chrome 150 behaves compared to pre-150 browser targets.

references.rationale: Lists correct reciprocal links to migration-auditor, anchor-matching-demo, and fragment-tester.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful custom table styling, monospace text fields, clean alignment, and high-contrast coloring rules.

openQuestions.title: Add batch import/export for CSV or JSON test vectors
openQuestions.detail: For auditing large sets of redirects/deep-links, importing a CSV list of links and exporting the Chrome 150 compatibility verdict would make the tester extremely powerful for system operators.

summary: An interactive utility that lets developers enter a set of known anchors and check arbitrary URLs to test their exact-case and case-insensitive matching outcomes.
